description:
Practical backlog summary anchor: **Tier 2 → Gap markers and session-phase organization**.

Backlog detail: `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/mastra-parity-backlog.md` → **Tier 2 / section 8. Gap markers and session-phase organization**.

Implementation context:
- chronology and rendering are currently mostly implicit in the human-readable observation text produced through `packages/pi-om-extension/src/prompts.ts` and persisted via `src/engine.ts`
- any new markers must still flow cleanly through `src/agents.ts`, `src/engine.ts`, `src/format.ts`, and the existing state model in `src/types.ts`
- this package is intentionally single-session first

What this epic should establish:
- legible long-gap / resumed-work markers
- lightweight phase transitions such as research → implementation or blocked → resumed
- chronology improvements without introducing thread attribution or multi-resource semantics

Useful references:
- backlog doc section 8
- temporal/gap context from section 1 of the same backlog doc
- local tests in `src/__tests__`

Use session phases, not thread management, as the organizing concept.
title: Add gap markers and session-phase organization
